data.name: Futanari Princess Royal Desires
data.detailed_description:
A troubled king, unable to satisfy his queen, accepts a mysterious stranger’s offer: one wish in exchange for one favor. His desire is granted, but when the stranger returns to claim his reward, the king refuses, and a terrible curse is cast upon his unborn child.

Born with both male and female traits, the royal child is hidden away in a distant castle, raised in isolation by loyal servants. As the years pass and the child nears their eighteenth birthday, strange changes begin to unfold. The mark of a curse that can no longer be contained.

Now, trapped between secrecy, sin, and destiny, the question remains, “Can the cursed heir escape the shadow of their father’s broken promise, or will the stranger’s curse consume them all?”

FEATURES

This game is a visual novel that tells a dark tale of desire, consequence, and inheritance.

  • Original Visuals & Characters

  • Animated Lewd Scenes

  • Futanari elements

  • Choice-Based Gameplay

  • Interactive map system

HOW TO PLAY

Read through the story, make choices, and shape the fate of the cursed heir.

Your decisions influence relationships, uncover hidden truths, and determine how the curse unfolds.

data.short_description: A broken wish. A cursed birth. A destiny that awakens at eighteen. Step into a tale of secrecy, transformation, and the shadow of an unforgiven promise.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: x86_64 or ARMv8 (SSE4.2 required for 4.5)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU supporting OpenGL 3.3
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Modern quad-core processor (Intel i5/Ryzen 5)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU supporting Vulkan 1.2+
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
